top_signals.title: U.S. missile moves in Japan send China clear message: A new era has arrived
top_signals.summary: The planned longer-term presence of a U.S. midrange missile system in Japan, combined with the fielding of other advanced weaponry, is complicating Chinese military planning.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Transparency data: HM Treasury: special advisers’ gifts, hospitality and meetings, January to March 2026
top_signals.summary: Data on gifts and hospitality received by special advisers, and meetings they attended with senior media figures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Apple Supplier Lingyi Rises in HK After $1.1 Billion Debut
top_signals.summary: Lingyi iTech Guangdong Co. a Chinese electronic supplier for Apple Inc. and Tesla Inc., rose in its Hong Kong debut after raising HK$8.3 billion ($1.06 billion) in a share sale, part of the city’s busiest month for listings this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Micron shares jump as blockbuster results spark Wall Street tech shake-up
top_signals.summary: Apple’s stock slides after company unveils price rises linked to ‘unprecedented’ cost of memory chips

top_signals.title: Two solicitors linked to Post Office scandal charged with misconduct
top_signals.summary: Two solicitors have been charged with alleged misconduct in relation to the Horizon IT scandal and have been referred to The Solicitors Disciplinary Tribunal. The Solicitors Regulation Authority (SRA), the legal regulator for English and Welsh solicitors, said it is taking action against Jane MacLeod, the former Post Office general counsel from 2015 to 2019, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ares Management flagship private credit fund slammed with withdrawal requests
top_signals.summary: Ares Management was plagued by investors attempting to pull out over $1.5bn from one its flagship private credit funds in the second financial quarter, as wealthy individuals continue to flee the asset class. The firm’s Ares Strategic Income fund, which holds roughly $11bn (£8.3bn), said it has received redemption requests worth 14.4 per cent of [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
